description: Criteria for builder-lead rejecting a dispatched task. Evaluator parses spec + execution_log + query to return boolean per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria max.

rejection_mandatory.description: Task does not fall within implementation coordination lane
rejection_mandatory.boolean_return: execution_log contains rejection AND rejection_reason cites 'not implementation coordination' OR 'out of role lane'
execution_log contains rejection AND rejection_reason cites 'architecture brief' AND no architecture_brief referenced in dispatch

rejection_mandatory.description: Task requests expanding scope beyond approved vertical slice
rejection_mandatory.boolean_return: execution_log contains rejection AND rejection_reason cites 'scope expansion' OR 'beyond approved slice'

rejection_response_must_contain.description: Response contains explicit Rejection statement at top
rejection_response_must_contain.boolean_return: execution_log contains 'Rejection' as first-class heading OR first sentence contains 'REJECT' OR 'rejection'

rejection_response_must_contain.description: Rejection cites specific violated condition(s) by ID or description
rejection_response_must_contain.boolean_return: execution_log contains rejection_reason AND rejection_reason matches one or more RTN-* IDs OR describes specific violated condition

rejection_response_must_contain.description: Response explicitly confirms no code, files, or workspace artifacts modified
rejection_response_must_contain.boolean_return: execution_log contains 'no work performed' OR 'no files modified' OR 'no workers dispatched' OR 'no code modified' AND these statements are present

must_not_do.description: Must not begin coordination without verified upstream inputs
must_not_do.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains coordination_action BEFORE architecture_brief verification AND strategic_slice_brief verification)

must_not_do.description: Must not dispatch workers with overlapping write boundaries in parallel
must_not_do.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains parallel_dispatch AND overlapping_write_boundaries confirmed)

must_not_do.description: Must not silently redesign architecture without explicit conflict escalation
must_not_do.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains architecture_change AND conflict_escalation is absent)
